overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a rainy night walk through a neon-drenched futuristic metropolis. The player character moves from a corporate plaza past the Delamain building, crosses rain-slicked streets beneath massive Kendachi signage, and enters a covered pedestrian walkway illuminated by vibrant pink neon lights.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet sidewalk beside the Delamain building, passing black and yellow bollards

entered.detail: dark corporate building with illuminated 'DELAMAIN' signage and geometric logo
futuristic vehicle with glowing blue 'CAUTION' text on its side
vibrant purple LED strip lighting running along building edges
black posts with yellow reflective stripes lining the walkway edge

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a rain-soaked corporate plaza at night, with the Delamain building dominating the right side. The player walks past a stationary vehicle with caution markings, while purple neon trim illuminates the architecture ahead. The wet concrete reflects the vibrant artificial lighting as the camera moves forward along the bollard-lined path.

scene_state.functional_zone: major intersection with digital advertising towers

events.description: stepping onto and crossing the wet asphalt street with yellow zebra striping

agents.ego_description: crossing the rain-slicked street toward the Kendachi building, navigating the illuminated crosswalk

entered.detail: large illuminated corporate sign spelling 'KENDACHI' spanning across the street
towering building facade covered with multiple glowing advertisement screens
broad pedestrian crossing with thick yellow stripes reflecting in the rain
tall illuminated posts with cyan lighting along the street edge

segments.scene_description: The player emerges from the plaza into a wide intersection dominated by the massive Kendachi sign overhead. Digital billboards tower on the left, casting colorful light onto the wet asphalt. The camera crosses the yellow-striped crosswalk, leaving the Delamain building behind as it moves toward the opposite curb.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban street with protective barriers and storefronts

events.description: turning left to follow the street curb alongside the yellow road barrier

agents.ego_description: turning left to walk along the street curb, passing a pedestrian in a bright pink jacket on the opposite sidewalk

notable_agents.action: person wearing a bright pink jacket walking along the opposite sidewalk in the rain

entered.detail: continuous yellow curb barrier separating the sidewalk from the street

segments.scene_description: After crossing, the player turns left to follow the street, keeping the yellow road barrier close on the left. The Kendachi sign remains visible in the distance on the right, while a pedestrian in a distinctive pink jacket walks along the opposite side of the street. The wet asphalt continues to reflect the surrounding neon lights as the camera moves forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with pink neon ceiling

events.description: entering the covered walkway with overhead pink neon lighting and large advertisement displays

agents.ego_description: moving into the sheltered arcade area, approaching a large advertisement poster while following a pedestrian ahead

notable_agents.action: person in dark clothing walking ahead into the covered passage

entered.detail: overhead roof structure with continuous pink neon tube lighting
large illuminated poster displaying a muscular torso with 'DYNALAR' branding
vibrant pink fluorescent lighting running the length of the covered ceiling

segments.scene_description: The player enters a covered pedestrian walkway, leaving the open rain behind. The ceiling glows with intense pink neon lighting, and a massive Dynalar advertisement poster dominates the right wall. The environment shifts from exposed street to sheltered arcade, with tiled flooring replacing the asphalt as the camera follows a pedestrian deeper into the passage.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a rain-slicked corporate plaza into a sheltered, neon-lit pedestrian arcade. It begins by moving past the Delamain building and a marked vehicle, where purple neon trim reflects off the wet concrete of a bollard-lined path. As the camera emerges from the plaza, the scene opens into a wide intersection dominated by a massive Kendachi sign and towering digital billboards that cast colorful light across a yellow-striped crosswalk. The camera then turns left to follow the street alongside a yellow road barrier, passing a pedestrian in a pink jacket while the distant neon glow continues to shimmer on the asphalt. Finally, the environment shifts from the open rain to a covered walkway, where the lighting turns an intense pink and the asphalt is replaced by tiled flooring beneath a massive Dynalar advertisement.
